title: HIR normalization pass (for-loop desugaring)
body:
Implemented a **HIR normalization** pass that desugars `for` loops into `while` loops (and related control-flow shapes) so later analysis and lowering see a smaller core grammar.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`68cb1fd`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/68cb1fd)
- **Subject:** Add HIR normalization pass with for-loop desugaring to while-loop transformation
- **Completed:** 2026-02-24

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-analysis`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-analysis-foundation`

## Relation
Desugar at HIR layer keeps the surface grammar ergonomic while semantic rules and lowering only implement normalized forms—pattern reused for string interpolation desugar later in the band. Reduced duplicate control-flow logic in type checking and visitor refactors.

source.subject: Add HIR normalization pass with for-loop desugaring to while-loop transformation
